name: Automate blog content creation with AI, Exa research, Gmail and Slack
description: Researches a topic using Exa web search, generates an SEO-optimized blog article with Claude AI, sends the article via Gmail, notifies a Slack channel, and logs the content in a Notion database page.

source.originalName: Automate blog content creation with GPT-4, Perplexity & WordPress

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web research

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for sending the article

notionKey.description: Notion connection key for logging articles

topic.description: Blog topic or research query (e.g. 'AI automation trends 2026')

recipientEmail.description: Email address to send the finished article to

notionParentPageId.description: Notion parent page ID to store the article under

steps.name: Build Exa search query from topic
Search the web for topic research with Exa
Build Claude prompt for blog article generation
Generate blog article with Claude AI
Parse Claude output and strip fences
Build Slack notification for published article
